'''Flyer Through Spikes''' was one of the [[Qom Jha and Qom Qae|Qom Jha]] sent by the [[Eater Of Fire Creepers]] to help [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] and [[Mara Jade Skywalker|Mara Jade]] find the [[Empire of the Hand]], following the [[Death/Legends|death]] of the [[Builder With Vines]].

{{Char-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[Vision of the Future]]'' {{Ab|Vision of the Future (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}}
*[[Vision of the Future (abridged audiobook)|''Vision of the Future'' abridged audiobook]]
